questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Database Replication?
options: Inefficient scaling of Master-Slave vs Multi-Master topologies.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Master-Slave vs Multi-Master topologies.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Master-Slave vs Multi-Master topologies scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
